infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Chapuu needs your location to display nearby restaurants and ensure accurate delivery mapping to your doorstep.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Chapuu needs access to your photo library to let you upload payment receipts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Chapuu needs access to your camera to let you take photos of payment receipts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Chapuu to use your location.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you upload payment receipts.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to let you take photos of payment receipts.
